zh.lifeSummary: Rose de Suffolk於1440年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可康尼 韋斯頓。她於1465年與Sir John Griggs在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1494年4月27日在英國英格蘭素福爾可索莫頓享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可索莫頓聖 馬加也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Suffolk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from the county of Suffolk.

nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ostensibly from the vocabulary word denoting the flower (Latin rosa). However, the name was in use throughout the Middle Ages, long before any of the other girls' names derived from flowers, which are generally of 19th-century origin. In part it may refer to the flower as a symbol of the Virgin Mary, but it seems more likely that it also has a Germanic origin, probably as a short form of various girls' names based on hros ‘horse’ or hrōd ‘fame’. The Latinate form Rohesia is commonly found in documents of the Middle Ages. As well as being a name in its own right, it is currently used as a short form of Rosemary and, less often (because of their different pronunciation), of other names beginning Ros-, such as Rosalind and Rosamund .

en.lifeSummary: Rose de Suffolk was born in 1440, in Coney Weston, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir John Griggs in 1465, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 27 April 1494, in Somerton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in St Margaret's Church, Somerton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Rose de Suffolkは1440年にイギリスイギリススフォルクコンエイ ウエストンで生まれた。1465年にイギリススフォルクでSir John Griggsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1494年4月27日にイギリスイギリススフォルクソマートンで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクソマートンスト マルガーエト'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Margaret's Church, Somerton, Baber: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 서머턴 스트 마가트'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Rose de Suffolk(은)는 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 코니 웨스턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1465년 영국 수폴크에서 Sir John Griggs(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1494년 4월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 서머턴에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 서머턴 스트 마가트'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.Saint Margaret's Church, Somerton, Baber: ст маргарет'с чурч, сомиртон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Rose de Suffolk родилась в 1440 г. в местности коуни вестон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Griggs в 1465 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 27 апреля 1494 г. в местности сомиртон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности ст маргарет'с чурч, сомиртон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
